author: vaiṣṇavadāsa
verses:
pahu̐ mora gaurāṅga gosāñī
ei kṛpā kara jena tomāra guṇa gāi

je se kule janma hauka, je se deha pāñā
tomāra bhakta-saṅge phiri tomāra guṇa gāiyā

cirakāla āśā prabhu āchaye hiyāya
tomāra nigūḍha līlā sphuraye āmāya

tomāra nāme sadā ruci hauka mora
tomāra guṇa-gāne jena sadāi hoi bhora

tomāra guṇa gāite śunite bhakta⋅saṅge
sāttvika vikāra ki hoibe mora aṅge

aśru⋅kampa⋅pulake pūribe saba tanu
bhūmite paḍibe preme ageyāna janu

je se kara prabhu, tumi ekamātra gati
kahaye vaiṣṇavadāsa tomāya rahuka mati
en_translation:
My Lord, Gaurāṅga Gosāñī! Please grant me this mercy, so that I may sing Your glories.

Whatever family I may be born into, whatever body I may attain, may I always wander in the company of Your devotees, singing Your glories.

O Lord, this hope remains forever in my heart, that Your confidential pastimes may manifest within me.

May I always have a taste for Your Holy Name, and may I always be absorbed in singing Your glories.

While singing and hearing Your glories in the company of devotees, what ecstatic transformations will manifest in my body!

My whole body will be filled with tears, trembling, and ecstatic bliss. I will fall to the ground, unconscious due to divine love.

Whatever You do, O Lord, You are my only refuge. Vaiṣṇava Dāsa says: "May my mind remain fixed on You."
